'''Gustav Zenlav''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]], who lived several [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] prior to the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A renowned Mandalorian [[Mandalorian shock trooper|shocktrooper]], Zenlav served as a [[General/Legends|general]] in the Mandalorian [[Army/Legends|army]] for a [[Time/Legends|time]], and later contracted out his services as a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]]. He became well known for his innovative weapon and [[Armor/Legends|armor]] designs,<ref name="TCSWE" /> including the powerful and [[Death/Legends|deadly]] [[Wing-Blast rocket pack]]. However, Zenlav ultimately abandoned the [[Rocket pack/Legends|rocket pack]] after realizing that his plans called for the use of an untested [[Photon/Legends|photonic]] beam, leaving the weapons platform unfinished for hundreds of [[Standard year/Legends|years]].<ref name="HotM" />

Zenlav was also the man historically reputed to be responsible for the founding of the [[MandalMotors/Legends|MandalMotors]] company,<ref name="TCSWE" /> a corporation famous for its vehicle designs. [[MandalMotors tower|Headquartered]] in [[Keldabe/Legends|Keldabe]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]],<ref name="HotM" /> MandalMotors became a driving force in Mandalore's economy, developing an outstanding reputation as a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] manufacturer.<ref name="TCSWE" /> Zenlav's brainchild<ref name="HotM" /> remained in business on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] for centuries, producing advanced starship models well into [[41 ABY]].<ref name="Revelation">''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The character of Gustav Zenlav was first introduced to the ''[[Star Wars]]'' universe in [[The History of the Mandalorians: Exploring the Evolution of a Mighty Race of Warriors|''The History of the Mandalorians'']], an article written by [[Abel G. Peña]], and published in [[January]] of [[2005]] as part of the [[Star Wars Insider 80|eightieth issue]] of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine.<ref name="HotM" /> Zenlav later received an informational entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', a [[2008]] reference book co-[[Author/Legends|authored]] by [[Stephen J. Sansweet]], [[Pablo Hidalgo]], [[Bob Vitas]], [[Daniel Wallace]], [[Chris Cassidy]], [[Mary Franklin]], and [[Josh Kushins]]. He was also mentioned in the Encyclopedia's entry for the MandalMotors company.<ref name="TCSWE" />
